summary: The notebook currently holds two notes: a machine-learning foundations course note on gradient descent and a reading note on the Transformer paper, spanning two research areas.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: One foundational course note covering gradient descent mechanics, learning-rate trade-offs, and a worked quadratic example.
areas.gap: Only the first note of the ml-foundations course exists; subsequent topics like momentum, Adam, and regularization are not yet present.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: A structured reading of the Transformer paper, including scaled dot-product attention, multi-head design, and WMT 2014 BLEU results.
areas.gap: No notes yet on the downstream improvements the critique flags, such as sparse attention, rotary positional encodings, or training-stability recipes.
